key.name: mission-control
key.description: Shows all open windows grouped by workspace.

key.name: app-expose
key.description: Spreads only the focused application's windows, mirroring macOS App Exposé.

key.name: window-switcher
key.description: Shows a material app/window switcher with live thumbnails.

key.name: window-hud
key.description: Shows quick actions for the focused window.

key.name: snap-left
key.description: Tiles the focused window to the left half of the work area.

key.name: snap-right
key.description: Tiles the focused window to the right half of the work area.

key.name: snap-top-left
key.summary: Snap the focused window top left
key.description: Tiles the focused window to the top-left quarter of the work area.

key.name: snap-top-right
key.summary: Snap the focused window top right
key.description: Tiles the focused window to the top-right quarter of the work area.

key.name: snap-bottom-left
key.summary: Snap the focused window bottom left
key.description: Tiles the focused window to the bottom-left quarter of the work area.

key.name: snap-bottom-right
key.summary: Snap the focused window bottom right
key.description: Tiles the focused window to the bottom-right quarter of the work area.

key.name: restore-window
key.description: Restores the focused window to the geometry it had before snapping.

key.name: center-window
key.description: Centers the focused window in the current work area.

key.name: hot-corner-top-left
key.description: Action triggered when the pointer reaches the top-left corner (macOS-style hot corners). 'none' disables the corner.

key.name: hot-corner-top-right
key.description: Action triggered when the pointer reaches the top-right corner. 'none' disables the corner.

key.name: hot-corner-bottom-left
key.description: Action triggered when the pointer reaches the bottom-left corner. 'none' disables the corner.

key.name: hot-corner-bottom-right
key.description: Action triggered when the pointer reaches the bottom-right corner. 'none' disables the corner.

key.name: snap-assist
key.summary: Offer Snap Assist after a half-snap
key.description: After snapping a window to the left or right half, offer the other open windows to fill the other half. Dismissed by Escape, a pick, or a short timeout.
